dataList.name: Headsplitting Memory
dataList.desc: On Clash Теряет, получает 1 [RegretSCorp] (один раз за ход)

dataList.name: Ch'unokkun
dataList.desc: Если this unit inflicted [TiedRope] на цели, получает [TiedWithRope]
dataList.flavor:
S Corp. commands two sorts of Taboo Hunters: The Royal Censors и the Ch'unokkuns.
Agents of the Royal Court, the Royal Censors generally operate alone, moving undercover to pursue those who have dared to break the Taboo of Salpippyeo.
Ch'unokkuns, much like Fixer Offices, form bands within their own ranks. Once an order или a contract to hunt down a Branded is bestowed upon them, each band hunts its mark in the manner preferred by the band. The hunt for Nobi knows neither honor nor dignity.

dataList.name: Scouring Hunterband [推刷巾]
dataList.desc: Наносит +5% урона за каждые 1 [Binding] на цели (макс. 15%)
dataList.flavor:
To cover the eyes is not to be blind.
These fabrics, created using Q Corp.'s Singularity, are fashioned в many forms, such as blindfolds и headbands, и are commonly used throughout the East. It is not unusual to see Fixers и employees of corporate entities in the East covering their heads и faces with these products.
The fabrics serve the same function as sunglasses, visors, и combat prosthetic eyes found elsewhere in the City. They scan the target's information in real time, augment the wearer's vision, и provide tactical analysis. При times, they can also serve as a means of communication with distant allies.

dataList.name: Tracking Traces
dataList.desc: При победе в клеше, получает 2  <sprite name="Breath"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Breath"><noparse>Кумара</noparse></link></u></color> за каждые [ScratchesHurt] на цели

dataList.name: Throwing the Ohra Bond
dataList.desc: On Hit, если target is Staggered, наносит 2 [Binding] на следующий ход

dataList.name: Arranged Information
dataList.desc: Если this unit inflicted [TakePicture] on an enemy, хилит 10 IQ

dataList.name: Firm Nailing
dataList.desc: On triggering [VibrationExplosion] on an enemy, raise target's Stagger Threshold by [LensmanNail] стаков

dataList.name: Swordplay of the Homeland [Sal] - Great Hwando
dataList.desc: Начало битвы: Получает 5 [ChoiSwordsmanship] Assume a different Battleform of the Homeland every 3 turns Конец хода: Если у этого юнита есть Shield, получает 5 Кумара и +2 счётчика Кумара на следующий ход Когда the following conditions are met, use a pattern that includes the "Bow of the Homeland - Arrowloose" Skill - Когда this unit lost all Clashes for 2 turns in a row (не check for Unopposed Attacks) - In the turn after the turn in which this unit spent in Stagger - Когда in Low Morale или Panic
dataList.flavor:
The Sword of the Homeland, S Corp.'s traditional art of swordsmanship, is also divided в three branches: Sal, Pi, и Ppyeo.
Within their teachings exist techniques to hew и cleave through creatures of colossal stature such as Sanguns.
To perform them in full, a swordsman must wield a great hwando capable of bearing the strain of the techniques.

dataList.name: Dujeong Brigandine [Sal] - Iron Bulwark
dataList.desc: Получает -30% урона from Изжоги, Кетчупа, [Vibration], Зелёнки , Депрессии (округляется вниз) Получает the effects of [PanicChangeLock]; Если this unit is Panicked в конце хода, reset IQ to 45 Upon entering the Encounter for the first time, получает 5 [ChoiSwordsmanshipShield] Когда [ChoiSwordsmanshipShield] исчезает, end Encounter
dataList.flavor:
The Eastern Warstride Armors are not so much "equipped" as they are "piloted." S Corp.'s Dujeong Brigandine is one example of such armor.
Much like R Corp.'s Powered Armor Suit и the Full Plate Armor used by the Knights of the West, the Dujeong Brigandine greatly augments the user's offensive и defensive combat capabilities.
Yet these advantages do not mean that Eastern Warstride Armors are readily supplied for combat personnel. Each unit has its own unique controls и comes with the limitation of requiring separate fuels.
What remains certain, however, is that, as with all the aforementioned armors, once a rider has familiarized himself with the Dujeong Brigandine's extended reach и heightened power output, he becomes a machine of war that strides across battlefields with the promise of slaughter.

dataList.name: Martial Arts of Perseverance
dataList.desc:
При победе в клеше, получает +2 счётчика  <sprite name="Breath"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Breath"><noparse>Кумара</noparse></link></u></color> (2 раз за ход)

Если the target this unit's Skill hit has less than 5 <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration"><noparse>Кетчупа</noparse></link></u></color> Potency, наносит 1 <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration"><noparse>Кетчупа</noparse></link></u></color> и +2 счётчика <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration"><noparse>Кетчупа</noparse></link></u></color> при Attack End (один раз за скилл, 2 раз за ход, prioritize the main target)
dataList.flavor:
'There are those who persevere in training for lack of talent. Then there are those blessed with talent, only to let it rust.'
'All men say that the title of Apex Blade can be seized only by the gifted.'
'It matters not. Until the day comes for this blade of mine to rise high enough to meet the clouds, I shall persevere in honing my prowess.'

dataList.name: Yield My Flesh
dataList.desc: Наносит и получает +20% урона on Critical Hit against и from Bamboo-hatted Kim

dataList.name: Developed Memories
dataList.desc: Upon entering the Encounter, получает 3 [PhotoTransitionChoi] Начало хода: При 0 [PhotoTransitionChoi] стаков, Retreat и transition в a different location Когда Returning to the field, based on current Battleform of the Homeland, получает или теряет [ChoiSwordsmanship] - Когда in [ChoiSwordsmanshipOne]: Получает стаков - Когда in [ChoiSwordsmanshipMany]: Теряет стаков

dataList.name: Mismatched Memories
dataList.desc: Начало хода: Получает the following effects: - Когда in [ChoiSwordsmanshipOne]: при менее чем 5 [ChoiSwordsmanship] стаков, получает (5 - [ChoiSwordsmanship] стаков) [Vulnerable] - Когда in [ChoiSwordsmanshipMany]: При more than 5 [ChoiSwordsmanship] стаков, получает [Vulnerable] равный surplus [ChoiSwordsmanship] стаков past 5

dataList.name: Swordplay of the Homeland [Sal] - Rend Flesh from Flesh
dataList.desc:
Начало битвы: Получает 5 [ChoiSwordsmanship]

Assume a different Battleform of the Homeland every 3 turns

On Hit using a Slash Skill, получает 1  <sprite name="Breath"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Breath"><noparse>Кумара</noparse></link></u></color> Potency (один раз за скилл)

Когда the following conditions are met, use a pattern that includes the "Bow of the Homeland - Arrowloose" Skill
- Когда this unit lost all Clashes for 2 turns in a row (не check for Unopposed Attacks)
- Turn after Stagger
- Когда in Low Morale или Panic

Начало хода: При Min или Max [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stacks, use a powerful Skill
Если this unit used the "Bow of the Homeland - Arrowloose" Skill in the last turn, use a powerful Skill regardless of [ChoiSwordsmanship] стаков на себе
При 55% или lower ХП, use a powerful Skill regardless of [ChoiSwordsmanship] стаков на себе
dataList.flavor:
The Sword of the Homeland passed down in the Sal Court Circle is not, при its heart, an art of killing.
To cut и cut again until blood runs dry и the bone is laid bare—that is the essence of this art that strips the opponent's flesh в ribbons.
That is the Sword of the Homeland practiced by "Sal."

dataList.name: Swordplay of the Homeland [Sal] - Shift Battleform
dataList.desc: Начало хода: Получает или теряет 2 [ChoiSwordsmanship] стаков based on Battleform of the Homeland на себе (не activate in the first turn of the Encounter) - [ChoiSwordsmanshipOne]: Получает стаков - [ChoiSwordsmanshipMany]: Теряет стаков In the turn where this unit equipped Envy Skills, this unit will not be affected by [ChoiSwordsmanship] стаков adjustment effects, и will reset [ChoiSwordsmanship] стаков to 5 на следующий ход

dataList.name: Dujeong Brigandine [Sal] - Great Mountain
dataList.desc: Получает -30% урона from Изжоги, Кетчупа, [Vibration], Зелёнки , Депрессии (округляется вниз) Получает the effects of [PanicChangeLock]; Если this unit is Panicked в конце хода, reset IQ to 45 Начало хода: Получает the following effects: - Когда in [ChoiSwordsmanshipOne]: при менее чем 5 [ChoiSwordsmanship] стаков, получает (5 - [ChoiSwordsmanship] стаков) [Vulnerable] - Когда in [ChoiSwordsmanshipMany]: При more than 5 [ChoiSwordsmanship] стаков, получает [Vulnerable] равный surplus [ChoiSwordsmanship] стаков past 5
dataList.flavor:
The three Court Circles of Sal, Pi, и Ppyeo each remade the standard Dujeong Brigandine of S Corp. в forms suited to their own doctrines.
The olden tales say that the "Sal" has ever been the first to spearhead a slaughter, eager to cleave the enemy's flesh before any other.
The "Pi" harvests the blood that spills forth from each opened flesh wound и turns it в endurance on the battlefield.
The "Ppyeo" takes the close of a slaughter. They part one joint from the other, bringing the enemy to their knees. Then, a blade through the neckbone finishes the collective act of killing.

dataList.name: Scattering Memories
dataList.desc: On death, give +1 Э.Г.О resource of the least-owned Affinity

dataList.name: Location-type Distortion: Photo Lab
dataList.desc: This unit cannot be killed, и не получает any урона from sources other than Skill урона от скиллов attacking this unit as the main target This unit's Speed is fixed to 1 Turn Start after entering the Encounter: Получает 3 [PhotoTransitionChoiCamera] Конец хода: Если [PhotoTransitionChoiCamera] reaches 0 стаков, или если this unit's ХП reaches 1, activate the following при the next Начало хода: - Remove self и N Corp. Class 2 Staff from the Encounter - Return Im Gyeong-eop to the Encounter - Move the battle to a different location

dataList.name: From Memory to Record
dataList.desc: Начало столкновения: Если the battlefield has returned from S Corp. to N Corp. this turn, хилит 15 IQ for all Sinners
